case_title: ESTELA SILVA VS. MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
ORDER DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) LIZ WOOLEY, AUTHORIZED REPRESENTATIVE FOR MIDLAND FUNDING LLC FILED BY DEFENDANT MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
REMARK: EXHIBITS DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON NOVEMBER 8, 2024 PURSUANT TO SECTION 1952 OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE OF CALIFORNIA.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,000.00 FILED BY SILVA, ESTELA AS TO DEFENDANT MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-17-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $125.00) SERVED MAY-27-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF ESTELLA SILVA IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT MIDLAND FUNDING LLC, REPRESENTED BY LIZ WOOLEY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
REMARK: EXHIBITS RECD BY MAIL SUBMITTED BY DEFENDANT
